note.zh: 在 Codex 应用内置的 Codex CLI 0.144.0-alpha.4 中以 GPT-5.6-Sol（ultra 思考档位），使用仓库标准中文提示词生成。此 case 使用独立、全新的 CODEX_HOME，并从空工作目录开始，未加载 harness 自带以外的任何 skill、插件、MCP、自定义规则或系统提示。原始 Ultra 回合在已完整写出可玩单 HTML 后，因宿主收到状态查询而在最终加固阶段中断；本页是中断前落盘的完整 fallback.html，仅原样重命名，未修改内容，也未重试生成。
note.en: Generated from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt by GPT-5.6-Sol (ultra effort) in Codex CLI 0.144.0-alpha.4 bundled with the Codex app. This case used a separate clean CODEX_HOME and started in an empty working directory, with no skills, plugins, MCP servers, custom rules, or system prompts beyond those bundled with the harness. The original Ultra turn was host-interrupted during final hardening after it had written a complete playable single-file HTML; this page is that saved fallback.html, renamed verbatim with no content changes and no retry.

note.zh: 同一 case 的另一版一次生成产物，与主产物并列保留。GPT-5.6-Sol（ultra 思考档位）在 Codex CLI 中用仓库标准中文提示词生成，未经人工修改。此版为『方块纪元』主题的沙盒建造。
note.en: An alternate one-shot artifact for this case, kept alongside the primary run. Generated by GPT-5.6-Sol (ultra effort) in Codex CLI from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt with no human edits. A 'Block Era' sandbox-building take.

note.en: Generated in one shot from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt by GPT-5.6-Sol (ultra effort) in Codex CLI 0.144.0-alpha.4 bundled with the Codex app. This case used a separate clean CODEX_HOME and started in an empty working directory, with no skills, plugins, MCP servers, custom rules, or system prompts beyond those bundled with the harness; this is the original agent artifact with no human edits.

note.en: A further alternate one-shot SVG for this case, kept alongside the primary run. Generated by GPT-5.6-Sol (ultra effort) in Codex CLI from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt with no human edits.

note.zh: 同一 case 的一次独立生成 SVG。使用仓库标准中文提示词，由 GPT-5.6-Sol（ultra 思考档位）在 Codex CLI 0.145.0-alpha.18 中生成；CLI 通过 CC Switch 的本地 custom provider 接入模型。运行位于独立、全新的 CODEX_HOME 和空工作目录中，并禁用了所有 skills、plugins、MCP、apps、browser、computer-use、image generation、hooks、multi-agent 与自定义规则。前三次连接官方 API 均失败且未产生作品，之后通过 CC Switch 成功完成一次生成。原始回复以 Markdown 代码块包裹完整 SVG；提交文件仅机械提取该 SVG 代码块并规范化换行，未进行视觉或 SVG 内容修改。
note.en: An independent SVG generation for the same case, produced from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt by GPT-5.6-Sol (ultra effort) in Codex CLI 0.145.0-alpha.18, with the CLI connected through CC Switch's local custom provider. The run used a separate clean CODEX_HOME and an empty working directory, with all skills, plugins, MCP servers, apps, browser, computer use, image generation, hooks, multi-agent features, and custom rules disabled. Three earlier attempts to connect to the official API failed without producing an artifact; one generation then completed successfully through CC Switch. The original response wrapped the complete SVG in a Markdown code block; this submission only mechanically extracts that SVG block and normalizes line endings, with no visual or SVG-content edits.

note.zh: 在 Codex 应用内置的 Codex CLI 0.144.0-alpha.4 中以 GPT-5.6-Sol（ultra 思考档位），使用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成。此 case 使用独立、全新的 CODEX_HOME，并从空工作目录开始，未加载 harness 自带以外的任何 skill、插件、MCP、自定义规则或系统提示。原始 Ultra 回合已生成完整 HTML 写入调用，但宿主状态查询在该调用执行前将回合中断；本页通过原样重放 rollout 中完整记录的 apply_patch 参数恢复，未续写模型，也未修改内容。
note.en: Generated in one shot from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt by GPT-5.6-Sol (ultra effort) in Codex CLI 0.144.0-alpha.4 bundled with the Codex app. This case used a separate clean CODEX_HOME and started in an empty working directory, with no skills, plugins, MCP servers, custom rules, or system prompts beyond those bundled with the harness. The original Ultra turn had produced the complete HTML write call when a host status query interrupted the turn before that call executed; this page was recovered by replaying the exact apply_patch payload recorded in the rollout, with no model continuation or content changes.

note.zh: 同一 case 的另一次独立、完整生成（『Calibre 01』），与主产物（受宿主中断后恢复的 AURELIUS S-01）并列保留。GPT-5.6-Sol（ultra 思考档位）在 Codex CLI 中用仓库标准中文提示词生成，未经人工修改。
note.en: A separate, complete generation for this case ('Calibre 01'), kept alongside the primary run (the interruption-recovered AURELIUS S-01). Generated by GPT-5.6-Sol (ultra effort) in Codex CLI from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt with no human edits.
